sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15108" key="a)ristoge/neqlos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀριστο-γένεθλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n15108.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">producing the best,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">χῶρος</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.686</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
